name: civ7-modding-tools
description: CLI tools and utilities for Civilization VII modding, including resource extraction, graph visualization, and XML analysis

scripts.check: bunx nx run-many -t check && bun run lint:workspace-entrypoints && bun run lint:domain-refactor-guardrails && bun run lint:mapgen-recipe-imports && bun run lint:normalization-guardrails && bun run lint:mapgen-docs
scripts.test:cli:play: bunx nx run @mateicanavra/civ7-cli:build && bun run --cwd packages/cli test -- game.play.end-turn.test.ts game.play.population-placement.test.ts game.play.attribute-tradition.test.ts game.play.town-focus.test.ts game.play.unit-target.test.ts game.play.progression-read.test.ts game.play.tactical-read.test.ts game.play.watch.test.ts game.play.topics.test.ts game.play.promotion-readiness.test.ts game.play.rehydrate.test.ts game.play.settlement-recommendations.test.ts game/play/ready-city.test.ts game/play/unit-move-preview.test.ts game/play/ready-unit.test.ts game/play/notification/queue.test.ts game/play/notification/dismiss-queue.test.ts game/play/notification/dismiss.test.ts game/play/notification/hud.test.ts game/play/priorities.test.ts game/play/semantic-envelope.test.ts game.play.first-meet.test.ts game.play.operation-wrappers.test.ts game.play.technology.test.ts game.play.culture.test.ts game.play.narrative.test.ts game.play.diplomacy-response.test.ts game.play.production.test.ts game.play.celebration-government.test.ts
scripts.publish:all: bun run publish:sdk && bun run publish:cli
scripts.link:cli: bun run build:cli && bun run --cwd packages/cli link:global
scripts.refresh:data: bun run resources:init && bun run --filter @civ7/plugin-files build && bun run dev:cli -- data zip default && bun run dev:cli -- data unzip default
scripts.mods:import: bun run dev:cli -- mod git import
scripts.verify:studio-run-in-game: bunx nx run-many -t build check --projects=@civ7/direct-control,@mateicanavra/civ7-sdk,mod-swooper-maps,mapgen-studio && bunx nx run-many -t test --projects=@civ7/direct-control,@mateicanavra/civ7-sdk,mapgen-studio && bunx nx run-many -t test:studio-run-in-game --projects=mod-swooper-maps && bun run openspec -- validate direct-control-new-game-setup --strict && bun run openspec -- validate studio-run-current-map-config --strict && bun run openspec -- validate studio-live-civ7-map-sync --strict && bun run openspec -- validate studio-disposable-setup-reload --strict && bun run openspec -- validate workspace-build-pipeline --strict && bun run openspec -- validate studio-run-in-game-robustness --strict && bun run openspec -- validate studio-operation-state-completion --strict && bun run openspec -- validate studio-save-run-state-machine --strict
scripts.ci:architecture-strict-core: bun run lint && bun run lint:adapter-boundary && bun run test:architecture-cutover && bun run lint:domain-refactor-guardrails && bun run check

author: Matei <tools@matei.work>
